From richardhanania.com

This kind of brain rot is about as depressing as Catturd's popularity.
Seeing the degree to which right wingers refuse to deal with reality has radicalized me in favor of the MSM. https://richardhanania.com/p/why-the-media-is-honest-and-good
These people are actually happy to be part of a movement where Catturd is their intellectual leader. Why doesn't the New York Times become more like him! Huh, libs? Afraid of open debate?

The problem with Twitter isn't a lack of "viewpoint diversity."
We have plenty! Nazis and Jackson Hinkle and Tucker have differences between them. The problem is that the new X is dominated by trash.
What a bizarre blind spot to not see lack of quality as the problem.

Elon Musk: The best evidence that the X algorithm pushes low quality info is that it gives us Nate Silver tweets. Not that Gunther and Jackson Hinkle dominate the algorithm.
How can someone so smart in some areas be this stupid? https://richardhanania.com/p/liberals-only-censor-musk-seeks-to

Why is Abott celebrating Diwali now?
Add this to the evidence that this website has been taken over by trash.
This one was invited to the White House press briefing.
Dystopian.

Polls show that people in war zones, like Ukraine and Gaza, want to keep fighting, but we all know many would leave if they could.
What explains this disparity?
I make the case for taking people's personal preferences seriously over political ones.

Before you get mad at this, realize you're probably getting mad at a foreign backed AI account.

The community notes shows why you need to get your worldview from reading instead of pictures and videos. They develop their worldview in the same way as toddlers who haven't yet learned how to read.

God this article made me support European governments locking up every last rightoid.
They don't eat at specific times according to the rules! They have bus boys!

So much good stuff in the recent Tucker podcast. I'm going to consolidate them in a thread.
Here's his guest saying overeating is caused by demons, unless you're a man who eats a lot of meat.

Tucker guest: Demons recruit politicians to run for office.
Tucker: Man, I've seen that a lot!
This guy visits the White House, is the top political podcaster in the country, and friends with JD Vance.
More such videos.

Tucker cuts from talking about demons and the things they say to a commercial selling a "miracle tooth powder" you can put on your toast. He promises viewers better health and more vivid dreams.
Actual direct quote, not a funny paraphrase:
"Vivid dreams are back! You dream
More here.
Interesting choice for Stewie.
Starting to suspect right-wing Twitter might not have the most accurate understanding of the left…
Porn is more addictive today, because Satanists have taught pornographers how to "curse the master copy."

When demons aren't in HR departments, they're also recruiting political candidates to run for office. Tucker is amazed by this and says the priest must feel so vindicated when watching the news.

Trump promises to hit every power plant in Iran if Hormuz isn't opened by Tuesday.
If he follows through, he'll test the theory that the reason the US hasn't been able to defeat weaker enemies over the years is that it just hasn't been brutal enough.
Trump Warns Iran He Could Strike 'Every Power Plant,' in WSJ Interview

Given the immigrant over representation in science and tech, this is about as crazy as Afrocentrists who think the white man "stole" black inventions.
Those people are simply racist haters, and so is Stephen Miller. But this racist hater has power.

2025 likely had the lowest *absolute* number of murders since 1968. Think about how big of a new story the rise in murder was. Nobody cares about an even more remarkable decline. Pessimism has won regardless of what's happening in reality. https://richardhanania.com/p/coups-in-africa-review-of-tylers
I'm pretty sure this is AI, but those people in the background look pretty realistic. The zoom in on their faces. Higher quality than anything I've seen before.
Really weird thing with AI now it'll just start including foreign writing some time for no reason.

There are over 400K US households with a net worth of over $30 mil.
That's more than the populations of over two dozen countries!
What an incredible story of innovation and achievement.
Some Europeans make life a bit nicer for the lazy and less productive.
Congrats I guess.
To be fair, I don't think these are Hasan Piker's views.

The era of liberals setting the terms of acceptable debate are over.

We used to name generations retrospectively, so we had material for analysis.
Now generation names are given first, and are a tool for people to push whatever agenda they want based on selective polling and data.
End the early naming of generations. https://richardhanania.com/p/please-stop-talking-about-zoomers
Easier to just say civilization versus third worldism.

The whole concept of "processed food" seems to be fake.
I always assumed excitement over this issue was based on the nature fallacy, pushed by the same types who believe vaccines are bad and big corporations are hiding the cure for cancer.
